{{Infobox artifact
| name = Heart (The Elder Empire: Sea)
| introduced = ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow
}}

''See also: [[Heart (The Elder Empire: Sea) Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The [[Heart of Nakothi]], also known as the [[Dead Mother]], is a gray organ roughly the size of a human fist. It was discovered inside a cage hanging from a chain near the deceased Emperor's body, having been pierced by the same strike that killed him. This artifact possesses a profound connection to humanity and can conform itself to an individual's intent, potentially due to personal compatibility or proximity to [[the Emperor]]. For over fifteen hundred years, the previous Emperor managed to keep the Heart at bay, but his death coincided with the awakening of [[Nakothi]]. The Heart is a highly significant object because whoever possesses it can claim the imperial throne, making it a central piece in the struggle for control over the Empire. Various factions seek to secure the Heart, including the [[Blackwatch]], who wish to bind it to a specific individual.}}

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The Heart is a valuable object that recently arrived on the [[island]]. Located within a crater, this [[gray-green heart]] pulses at the center of a network of veins and tendons. It is an item sought by the [[Consultants]], and it may possess a desire to be bonded with a human. As [[Calder]] searches for the object, [[the Emperor]]'s successor engages in a struggle over the Dead [[Mother's Heart]]. The entity remains a concept or object that may be drawing closer.}}

{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The Heart has been found.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c9">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 9</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|A [[gray-green heart]] pulses at the center of a network of veins and tendons in the crater.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c11">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The Heart is an object that the [[Consultants]] are after.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c11" />}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The Heart may want to be bonded with a human.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c14">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 14</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The Heart is an object that arrived on the [[island]] recently.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c18">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 18</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[The Emperor]]'s successor is fighting over the Dead [[Mother's Heart]].<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c20">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 20</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|[[Calder]] is looking for the Heart.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c22">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 22</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The Heart is a concept or object that may be getting closer.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c23">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|The Heart is a valuable object.<ref name="ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow-c25">''Of Sea and Shadow'', chapter 25</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Of Sea and Shadow]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire artifacts]]
